home.title: LiveOL
home.searchTooltip: Enter at least {{ count }} characters to search

body: LiveOL is an app that displays orienteering-results live.
You get the latest results on your phone or tablet with a convenient interface in multiple languages.
LiveOL integrates many Orienteering related services, like liveresultat.orientering.se and Eventor Sweden.
Our vision is to be the best orienteering platform for mobile devices.

box.text: Get the most out of LiveOL and support its continued development. Check out LiveOL+ today:

step1.title: Add runner details
step1.description: Enter the runner's name, their clubs, and the classes they compete in.

step2.title: Smart matching
step2.description: The system finds your runners across all competitions, even with (slightly) different spellings.

step3.title: Get highlighted
step3.description: See your followed runners instantly highlighted in competition results.

step4.title: Follow multiple runners
step4.description: If you have LiveO+ you can follow as many runners as you like, otherwise you are restricted to following yourself.

example.title: Pro tip
example.description: Add multiple clubs if your runner competes for different organizations. The system will find them wherever they race!

settings.title: Settings & Preferences
settings.clearCacheConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the cache? This cannot be undone.

about.title: About & Support
about.text:
LiveOL shows live orienteering results right on your phone. Get the latest standings with a clean, easy-to-use interface in multiple languages.

We pull together results from liveresultat.orientering.se, Eventor, and other orienteering services. Our goal? To be the go-to orienteering app for your phone or tablet.
